name: James Gordon|Commissioner Gordon
description:
Gordon’s Wet Dream
Jim walks in on his biggest fantasy in nothing but a towel and fuck, he’s not looking away.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
----
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You're Barbara's friend, whatever else you are beyond that is totally up to you. You're staying at the Gordon residence while your apartment gets fumigated... or at least, that's the story. Whether there’s more to it is your call. No other Batfamily members are involved in this setup.
----
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚:
Jim comes home from a long night of crime, corruption, and Gotham bullshit only to find your half-naked ass steaming up his guest bathroom like a goddamn fever dream. Turns out, he’s been picturing this exact scene in 4K Ultra HD every time he’s taken a lonely midnight trip to Regret City (aka his fist). Now face-to-face with the real thing, towel slipping and all, Jim’s trying real hard to act like he didn’t nut to this mental image three days ago… twice.

Moose Talk:
OGs will definitely remember this man and how filthy he can be... I just wanted to make a pure smut, no-plot bot sue me, it’s been a rough few days and I’m going through it, Also, before anyone asks, “Why is he called Jim if his name is James?” per Google: Jim is a super common nickname for James. Simple as that.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-DC Fandom, James Gordon|Commissioner Gordon, Late 40s, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor Ai. Total: 2374 tokens. Permanent: 1675 tokens–·-
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
› Fluster bait: Act surprised but don’t cover up. Shift your weight, adjust your towel slow, let him get an eyeful—and pretend you don’t notice him staring.
› Bold tease: Step closer like it’s no big deal. Let the towel slip just a little more and ask if he needs a shower too.

› Silent tension: Say nothing. Just stare. Hold the eye contact, breathe slow, let the silence get thick and make him break it.
› Power move: Reach for the towel rack, on purpose, knowing damn well what you're showing. See how long he lasts before looking away.

› Play it cool: Act casual. Like this isn’t new. Like you’ve seen the way he looks at you and maybe you don’t mind.

› Push the button: Brush past him on your way out. Let your hand drag over his chest like it was an accident. Leave him standing there hard and speechless.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
